arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Responds to Viewer Unhappy With Commentary During Athletic Club 0-3 Man Utd
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand Responds to Viewer Unhappy With Commentary During Athletic Club 0-3 Man Utd

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim shows true colours as he picks out Man Utd mistake in brilliant Bilbao win
arts.sum: Manchester United have put one foot into the Europa League final by beating Athletic Bilbao 3-0 in Spain but their Portuguese manager is cautious of being too confident ahead of the second leg
